'''Roj''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an enlisted [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] within the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military's]] [[4th Squad]], which was under the command of [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Jobin]].

==Biography==
Roj's [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was a part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] contingent that served at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. They were stationed at [[Echo Station 5-7/Legends|Echo Station 5-7]]. During the battle, a group of [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] and an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] attacked the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. Jobin took Roj and several others—[[Grond (Rebel)|Grond]], [[Sora]], and another Rebel—and attacked the stormtroopers. The squad successfully destroyed the All Terrain Scout Transport. Roj then assaulted the ion cannon with the rest of the group, liberating it from the stormtroopers. However, during the battle both Grond and the unidentified rebel were [[Death/Legends|killed]].

Roj, Jobin, and Sora then retreated to Echo Base in search of transport off-planet. However, they encountered [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. They retreated to an adjacent hangar which contained a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighter]]. As they ran aboard, Jobin was shot. Roj wished to take Jobin with him, but Jobin told him to escape, throwing him a recorded massage he had written to [[Mon Mothma/Legends|his mother]]. Roj and Sora successfully escaped the Empire and made it back to the Rebel fleet, where they delivered the message to [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]].
